name: get_deal_stage
description: Retrieves the current pipeline stage and metadata for a CRM deal. Optionally includes the full stage history timeline and associated notes for deal review and forecasting.

deal_id.description: The unique identifier of the CRM deal to retrieve stage information for.
deal_id.$comment: Opaque string ID assigned at deal creation. Returns 404 if the deal does not exist or the caller lacks read access.

include_history.description: Whether to include the full chronological history of stage transitions for this deal.
include_history.$comment: History data can be large for long-running deals; defaults to false to keep the default response lightweight.

include_notes.description: Whether to include all notes associated with this deal in the response.
include_notes.$comment: Notes are returned in reverse-chronological order when included. Large note volumes may increase response payload significantly.
